name: InputTextMessageContent
description: Represents the content of a text message to be sent as the result of an inline query.

fields.name: message_text
fields.description: Text of the message to be sent, 1-4096 characters

fields.name: parse_mode
fields.description: Mode for parsing entities in the message text. See formatting options for more details.

fields.name: entities
fields.description: List of special entities that appear in message text, which can be specified instead of parse_mode

fields.name: link_preview_options
fields.description: Link preview generation options for the message
